7060451.summary: This basin shares the Lerma-Chapala-Santiago aquifer system, which is categorized as overexploited. It is highly dependent on the Cutzamala transfer system for urban supply.

7060482.summary: Primarily dependent on deep wells within the Queretaro aquifer. Rapid industrial growth has increased the stress on local groundwater reserves.

sources.title: State of Queretaro Water Commission Communique

7060073920.summary: Zumpango-Ecatepec Northeast region. High-pressure urban corridor with significant hydrologic stress due to the Cutzamala system dependency.

7060073910.summary: Chalco-Xico region. Characterized by seasonal surface water captures and high dependency on local groundwater for urban fringes.

7060854410.summary: Amecameca Far-South Basin. High-altitude watershed with direct recharge from the Popocatepetl glacier. Critical mountain spring ecosystem.
